allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/config/projects.json'\); const proj = Object.values\(p\)[0]; const long = proj?.description?.templates?.long || {}; console.log\('introHook count:', long.introHook?.length\); console.log\('storyBlock count:', long.storyBlock?.length\); console.log\('philosophyLine count:', long.philosophyLine?.length\); console.log\('closingSignal count:', long.closingSignal?.length\); console.log\('layout:', JSON.stringify\(long.layout\)\); console.log\('introHook[0]:', long.introHook?.[0]?.substring\(0,80\)\); console.log\('storyBlock[0]:', long.storyBlock?.[0]?.substring\(0,80\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/config/projects.json'\); const proj = Object.values\(p\)[0]; const long = proj?.description?.templates?.long || {}; console.log\('customBlocks:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(long.customBlocks || {}\)\)\); const cb = long.customBlocks || {}; Object.entries\(cb\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(k, ':', JSON.stringify\(v\).substring\(0,100\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/config/projects.json'\); const proj = Object.values\(p\)[1]; const long = proj?.description?.templates?.long || {}; console.log\('proj 2 long keys:', Object.keys\(long\)\); console.log\('layout:', JSON.stringify\(long.layout\)\); console.log\('introHook count:', long.introHook?.length\);")
